title: German Vegan Midnight Delight
description: A rich and creamy German-inspired dessert made with midnight oats and a touch of delight. Perfect for a comforting treat after a long day.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, bring the non-dairy milk to a simmer over medium heat.
Add the maple syrup, vanilla extract, and salt. Stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and add the midnight oats. Cook, stirring constantly, for 5-7 minutes or until the oats have absorbed most of the liquid and have a creamy consistency.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the coconut oil until melted and well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish or individual ramekins.
Top with chopped almonds and dried cranberries.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
